primary_source: Whittaker, 1903. On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics. Math. Annalen 57:333-355. DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290.
title: QA Whittaker Rational Direction S^1 PASS [266] - canonical net at m=9
_fixture_purpose: Primary PASS fixture for cert [266] at m=9. Asserts that the QA-rational direction set D_9 has exactly 55 elements (one per coprime seed pair (b,e) in {1..9}^2), G_max(9) = 370, and that all 1485 distinct pairs (i<j) of D_9 satisfy the cross-product integrality bound |C_i*F_j - C_j*F_i| >= 1 (W2 theorem). The closed-quadrant max angular gap Delta_max^+(9) is bounded above by 0.21 rad. This fixture exercises gates WRD_1, WRD_DECL, WRD_W1, WRD_W2 (all-pairs), WRD_HARD, WRD_SRC, WRD_WIT.
source_attribution: (Whittaker, 1903) On the partial differential equations of mathematical physics, Math. Annalen 57:333-355, DOI: 10.1007/BF01444290; primary-source PDF at Documents/whittaker_corpus/whittaker_1903_partial_differential_equations_mathematical_physics.pdf. Bridge spec docs/specs/QA_WHITTAKER_RATIONAL_DIRECTION_CERT_DRAFT.md. Authored Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-30.

witnesses.name: asymmetric_seed_(2,1)
witnesses.expected_direction_components: (6/10, 8/10) = (3/5, 4/5) - non-primitive Pythagorean triple but distinct direction from (1,1)
